semantic.role: Vitest-based test suite for verifying the Writer Boundary Layer (facade-based import rules). Ensures that internal modules within a directory can only be imported through a designated facade file, and validates that importers are explicitly allowed.
responsibilities: Define a `BoundaryRule` type and a `collectFiles` utility for recursively gathering source files.
Test that each internal directory has a corresponding facade file and that all imports to internal modules go through that facade.
Validate that importers are listed in the `allowedImporters` set of the boundary rule.
outOfScope: Production enforcement of import boundaries (runtime checks are elsewhere).
CLI commands, HTTP handlers, MCP tools, or service interfaces.
Any code related to project scanning, pipeline execution, or LLM interaction.
invariants: Test file must end with `.test.ts` or `.spec.ts` (rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Reinforce the writer boundary contract by ensuring that internal implementation details are only accessed through a single facade entry point.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent change intent provided; the file appears to be an established test for facade-based import rules.
